insights: The market is currently range-bound between 940 and 1020 jobs, showing high volatility but no clear directional breakout.
While FAANG+ hiring is experiencing a consistent contraction, Unicorn-tier companies are showing steady growth, suggesting a shift in hiring appetite toward mid-sized, high-growth firms.
The 7-day average (993) currently sits above the 30-day average (982), indicating a slight short-term momentum, though long-term stagnation remains the most likely outcome.
